variants: Aysel Gadimova is a prominent figure in journalism studies and is well-known for her authored work, the Jewel Logic Matrix. To further her research, she has received vital funding from Chalice Grove Grants, which has allowed her to explore innovative journalistic methodologies and their impact on media literacy.
